description: Timewear from giordano has an elegant contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A piece designed for modern life yet remaining true to its heritage and roots.Case diameter: 44 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1 YearStainless steel copper gold coloured caseBlack leather strap with a tang claspBlack dial with branding at the 12 hour markDate aperture at the 3 hour markScrew to reset timeCopper gold hands and roman numerals for time indicationSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 metresWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
